title: Amplified Dimension
description: Adds a new amplified dimension that does its best to mirror the overworld!
body:
# Basics
Adds a dimension that mirrors the overworld, but it uses the amplified terrain generator!
This dimension is as close as can be to the overworld in terms of biome placement, structure placement, and feature placement. 

**Terrablender biomes seem to work in the amplified dimension.**


## Important Notes
**This datapack/mod does not provide a way to enter the dimension!** I recommend using the Datapack Portals Mod to make a datapack that allows you to construct a portal that leads to the dimension. The Dimension's namespace is "amplidim:overworld" in case you want to use the execute command to teleport into it.

_It does rain in the dimension, but for the /weather command to work, you have to execute it in the default overworld. The weather is synced between both dimensions, as well as time._

###  Other Recommendations
Any datapack that makes the overworld taller. It will apply to the amplified dimension too and allow you to build on the taller mountains, which stretch very close to build limit!

Tested on 1.20.1 but also might work on other versions.

## Usage In Modpacks
You're more than welcome to put this in a modpack, **just credit me if the modpack is public**!

_Note to Modpack Authors_: since this dimension isn't exactly the overworld, some mods might need extra configuring to recognize it as a valid overworld dimension for some of their features!
